questions.question: Why does reading the DOM immediately after changing reactive state return stale values?
options: Vue's reactivity system debounces all updates by 16ms for animation frame alignment
Vue batches DOM updates asynchronously: the update happens in the next microtask
Template refs are only refreshed during the component's update lifecycle hook
The browser's rendering pipeline delays DOM reflection until the next paint

questions.question: Which of these use cases genuinely requires nextTick?
options: Computing a derived value from reactive state
Watching for changes to a ref's value
Focusing an input element after setting showInput to true
Filtering a reactive array before rendering

questions.question: In addition to await nextTick(), what other form does nextTick support?
options: Vue.nextTick() as a static method on the Vue object
this.$nextTick() only in the Options API
